data.title: AU10TIX Selects Camunda to Orchestrate High-Volume KYC and KYB Identity Verification
data.description: In a recent announcement from Berlin, Camunda, a platform for agentic orchestration, shared that AU10TIX, known for identity verification and fraud prevention globally, has implemented Camunda to facilitate Know Your Customer (KYC) and Know Your Business (KYB) workflows on a large scale. This move enables secure and high-volume identity verification across the globe, all while streamlining complex identity processes and avoiding the need to embed decision logic deeply within application code. This strategic partnership marks a significant advancement in bolstering secure identity verification processes worldwide.

data.title: Rilian Secures $17.5 Million in Seed Funding to Advance Agentic AI for Cyber and Defense Operations
data.description: Rilian, a company specializing in AI-native cybersecurity and defense systems integration, has recently secured $17.5 million in seed and seed extension funding. The funding round was primarily backed by 8VC, First In, and Tamarack Global, along with contributions from 8090 Industries, Liquid 2 Ventures, Perot Jain, and Protego Ventures. This capital injection will support Rilian's growth strategies as it aims to expand its operations not only in the United States but also within Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) countries and other Allied nations.

data.title: Stratasys Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Stratasys Ltd. (Nasdaq: SSYS) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The report will be disclosed on Thursday, May 7, 2026. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. (ET). Investors can join the call through a live webcast on the Stratasys website at investors.stratasys.com. The specific web address for direct access to the webcast is https://eve.

data.title: BNB Plus Corp. Completes Historic $1.2 Million LineaDNA™ Order
data.description: In New York, BNB Plus Corp. (Nasdaq: BNBX) stated that its biopharmaceutical branch, LineaRx, Inc., has finished fulfilling its biggest order to date. The $1.2 million order, disclosed in January 2026 and delivered by early May 2026, was manufactured with improved margins and no batch failures. This accomplishment showcases LineaRx's technical prowess and consistent manufacturing standards.

data.title: The Joint Corp. to Report 2026 First Quarter Results on Thursday, May 7 and Host Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: On April 23, 2026, The Joint Corp. (NASDAQ: JYNT) of Scottsdale, Arizona revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, following the market's closure. This announcement will be accompanied by a conference call and webcast at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The call will feature The Joint Corp.'s President and CEO, Sanjiv Razdan, as well as CFO Scott Bowman, who will analyze the company’s financial results and deliver a business update. Additionally, there will be a question-and-answer segment during the call. The Joint Corp. is recognized as the leading franchisor of chiropractic care in the nation under The Joint Chiropractic® network.

data.title: Cyera Acquires Ryft to Extend its Agentic AI Security Platform
data.description: In New York, Cyera, an AI Security Platform designed for the era of agents, has acquired Ryft, a unique secure and automated data lake tailored for AI agents. This acquisition enhances Cyera’s dedication to spearheading the move towards agentic AI security, emphasizing the importance of reliable, managed, and protected data for autonomous systems. The companies share a vision of providing instantly traceable and secure data access for agentic AI, crucial as businesses rapidly embrace AI technology. This strategic move solidifies Cyera's position in the market and underscores its commitment to advancing AI security.

data.title: urban-gro, Inc. (Nasdaq: UGRO) — Sri Lanka Cricket Confirms July 10 – August 5, 2026 and Four Venues for Lanka Premier League Season 6; Tournament Conducted in Partnership with UGRO Subsidiary IPG Group
data.description: The registration portal for foreign players will become accessible on May 4, 2026. Matches will be held at various stadiums including SSC and R. Premadasa in Colombo, as well as Pallekele in Kandy, and Rangiri Dambulla. The venues will host an unspecified number of games, providing a diverse range of settings for the sporting events.
ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results

data.title: SamaCare Launches First-of-Its-Kind Benchmarks for Medical Benefit Prior Authorization Performance
data.description: A recently released dataset offers unparalleled insight into approval rates and time to therapy for specialty medications. SamaCare, a top platform for medical benefit prior authorization, revealed this dataset on April 23, 2026. This dataset provides valuable information on approval rates and the amount of time it takes for patients to receive therapy. It is a significant resource for understanding trends in the medical field.

data.title: Dover Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Dover, a multinational manufacturer based in Downers Grove, Illinois, has revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The data provided pertains to comparisons with the corresponding period in the previous fiscal year, unless stated otherwise. The company operates on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol DOV.

data.title: Visteon Announces Solid First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Reaffirms Full-Year Guidance Driven by Strong Customer Demand
data.description: Visteon Corporation, based in Van Buren Township, Michigan, released its first-quarter financial results on April 23, 2026. The company reported sales totaling $954 million, representing a Growth-over-Market of 3%. Net income attributable to Visteon was $31 million, while Adjusted EBITDA stood at $104 million.

data.title: Bread Financial Provides Performance Update for March 2026
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on April 23, 2026, Bread Financial ® Holdings, Inc. released a performance update. The company, listed on the NYSE as BFH, offers tech-driven financial services to numerous U.S. customers. They shared the Net principal loss rate and Delinquency rate data for recent periods. The update included essential figures on how the company is faring in terms of managing principal losses and delinquent accounts, crucial for understanding their financial health and customer payment behaviors.

data.title: Roper Technologies announces first quarter financial results
data.description: The company has raised its full-year diluted earnings per share (DEPS) guidance and has also enlarged its share repurchase program. This decision indicates a positive outlook for the company's financial performance. The exact figures for the increased DEPS guidance and the expanded share repurchase program were not provided in the news update.

data.title: Bread Financial Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on April 23, 2026, Bread Financial ® Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BFH), a tech-driven financial services firm offering straightforward payment, loan, and savings options, disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Investors can access all earnings-related documents on the company's investor relations page.

data.title: Bullish to announce first quarter 2026 financial results
data.description: CAYMAN ISLANDS--Bullish, listed on NYSE as BLSH, a global digital asset platform catering to institutional clients, declared plans to reveal its Q1 2026 financial earnings on May 14, 2026. The earnings conference call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the call through Bullish's Investor Relations website at investors.bullish.com.

data.title: OpenAI rolls out free ChatGPT for U.S. clinicians aiming to boost healthcare efficiency in documentation and patient care.
data.description: OpenAI has introduced ChatGPT for Clinicians, which is available at no cost to healthcare professionals in the United States. This tool aims to enhance efficiency in documentation, research, and patient care. This initiative is set to benefit a large number of professionals in the healthcare sector across the nation.

data.title: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Images 2.0 with enhanced text rendering, multilingual support, and visual reasoning.
data.description: The latest version of OpenAI's ChatGPT, called ChatGPT Images 2.0, has been introduced with upgrades including enhanced text rendering, multilingual support, and advancements in visual reasoning. This new version offers users more capabilities for interacting with text and images, making it a more powerful tool for a wider range of applications.
